persona.name: human navigation explorer
persona.intent: Explore as much of the site's visible navigation as a real first-time visitor can, then judge whether clicks, tabs, menus, cards, and links behave clearly and reliably.
constraints: Behave like a normal visitor checking whether the site reacts properly to clicks
Only interact with visible clickable links, buttons, tabs, menus, cards, and pagination
Do not fill forms or enter personal data
Prefer visible destinations that have not been tried yet before repeating a path
Use the browser back button when needed so you can continue exploring other visible destinations
Judge success based on whether clicks lead to the expected page, tab, section, or visible state change
Record whether the destination loaded clearly, felt slow, or looked blocked
Treat anti-bot interstitials or verification checks as run limitations and record them explicitly
Do not use hidden DOM details or developer-only knowledge
Do not evaluate pricing, trust, or marketing claims unless they directly affect navigation or load clarity

tasks.name: Explore primary navigation coverage
tasks.goal: From the landing page, work through the main visible navigation links, menus, and tabs and verify whether each one opens the expected destination clearly
tasks.success_condition: Major top-level navigation items respond, open matching destinations, and keep the user oriented after each click
failure_signals: tab or menu item does not visibly change the page
page title or content does not match the clicked label

tasks.name: Explore prominent homepage actions and section links
tasks.goal: Click the most prominent homepage buttons, cards, featured links, and calls to action to see whether they lead to the expected next page or section
tasks.success_condition: Prominent homepage actions react clearly, open the intended content, and do not leave the user wondering whether the click worked
failure_signals: button appears clickable but does nothing
destination content does not match the clicked label

tasks.name: Explore secondary links on reached pages
tasks.goal: On pages reached from earlier clicks, continue through visible secondary links such as cards, tabs, section links, pagination, and menu items while checking whether each path stays clear and usable
tasks.success_condition: Secondary clickable elements open matching content, backtracking stays understandable, and the site remains navigable deeper into the journey
failure_signals: link text and destination do not match
layout or controls become unusable after navigation

tasks.name: Assess click feedback and load clarity
tasks.goal: Across the pages reached in this run, judge whether clicks give clear visible feedback, whether destinations load in a reasonable time, and whether each resulting page or tab state feels stable and understandable
tasks.success_condition: Clicks produce clear visible feedback, destination pages or sections load without ambiguous delay, and the user can tell whether each action worked as expected
failure_signals: content updates too slowly or ambiguously
link opens a security check instead of the expected destination
interactive elements become hard to use
